songs.title: DASA Theme-Song_Saved To serve
songs.lyrics:
Verse 1
Once there was a call made many years ago 
A call to serve, a call to rise up and go
A call to tell of amazing grace 
To tell of heaven, a blessed place
A call to young people to rise up

We answer to the call from heaven above
To serve with faith, to serve with joy and love 
To share of amazing Grace
How Christ came down and took my place 
And for this very reason I’ll rise up 

Chorus
To sing the song of the Lamb
Who took away my sins
I am saved to serve, saved to serve (2x)
I am saved to serve, saved to serve 

Verse 2
Our Hearts, Our Souls, our lives we offer you 
This world, this life, this school, we’re passing through 
Many have come and gone before
Many more will stand here, and in choir 
Proclaim your grace and goodness forever 

Chorus
To sing the song of the Lamb
Who took away our sins
We are saved to serve, saved to serve (2x)
We are saved to serve, saved to serve 

Bridge
Hallelujah! King forever
Hallelujah! King forever
Hallelujah! King forever
Hallelujah! King forever

Chorus
To sing the song of the Lamb
Who took away our sins
We are saved to serve, saved to serve (2x)
We are saved to serve, saved to serve (2x)

songs.title: In Need Of Grace
songs.lyrics:
Verse 1
In need of Grace, In need of love
In need of mercy raining down from higher above
In need of strength, in need of peace
In need of things than only you can give to me

Chorus
In need of Christ, the perfect Lamb
My refuge strong, the greater I am
This is my song, my humble plea
I am your child, I am in need

Repeat Verse 1 and Chorus again

songs.title: I Raise A Hallelujah
songs.lyrics:
Verse 1
I Raise A Hallelujah 
In The Presence Of My Enermies
I Raise A Hallelujah
Louder Than The Unbelief
I Raise A Hallelujah
My Weapon Is A Melody
I Raise A Hallelujah 
Heaven Comes To Fight For Me

Chorus
Am Gonna Sing, 
In The Middle Of The Storm
Louder And Louder 
You Gonna Hear My Praises Roar
Up From The Ashes Hope Will Arise
Death Is Defeated The King Is Alive
 
Verse 2
I Raise A Hallelujah
With Everything Inside Of Me
I Raise A Hallelujah
I Will Watch The Darkness Flee
I Raise A Hallelujah
In The Middle Of The Mystery
I Raise A Hallelujah
Fear You Lost Your Hold On Me!

Chorus
Am Gonna Sing, 
In The Middle Of The Storm
Louder And Louder 
You Gonna Hear My Praises Roar
Up From The Ashes Hope Will Arise
Death Is Defeated The King Is Alive

Bridge
Sing A Little Louder (3x)
In The Presence Of My Enemies
Sing A Little Louder
Louder Than The Unbelief
Sing A Little Louder
My Weapon Is A Melody
Sing A Little Louder
Just Sing…

Bass 
I Will Sing A Little Louder
I Will Sing A Little Louder
I Will Sing A Little Louder
Sing A Little Louder 
Just Sing…

Chorus
Am Gonna Sing, 
In The Middle Of The Storm
Louder And Louder 
You Gonna Hear My Praises Roar
Up From The Ashes Hope Will Arise
Death Is Defeated The King Is Alive (2x)

Raise A Hallelujah!!

songs.title: Heaven
songs.lyrics:
Verse 1
Heaven is a place beyond the sky 
Heaven is the place we will be
Heaven is a place we’re longing for
Heaven is a place we will have a good rest
Jesus calling from above, Are you ready my children?
I am coming again

Chorus
Heaven is amazing 
Heaven is amazing place together we’ll enjoy 
The everlasting life 
Angels sing in chorus, blowing high the trumpet
While we meet Jesus.

Repeat verse 1 and chorus again

songs.title: I’m Gonna Stand Up
songs.lyrics:
Verse 1
This world is drowning in moral decay
Misguided by lies people are led astray
You said the harvest is plentiful but the 
Laborers are few
I’m not that worthy oh lord but
I’m available for you

Chorus
I’m gonna stand up
Stand up and be counted
Raise my hands up
In service for you Jesus
Here i am send me lord
Send me with your spirit your word
Raise up an army for you lord
Stand up, stand up and be counted

Verse 2

Jesus Christ will soon return (soon return)
The kingdom of god is almost at hand (almost at hand)
Will you be found doing his great work
Cloth in righteousness and truth
Or will he find you asleep like the rest of this world too

Chorus
I’m gonna stand up
Stand up and be counted
Raise my hands up
In service for you Jesus
Here i am send me lord
Send me with your spirit your word
Raise up an army for you lord
Stand up, stand up and be counted

Final Chorus
 Raise my hands up
In service for you jesus
Here I am send me lord
Send me with your spirit your word
Raise up an army for you lord
Stand up, stand up and be counted
Stand up, stand up and be counted
Stand up
